title: Team Foundation
description: Agent creates and manages persistent teammates

steps.content: Build a full-stack app: frontend in React, backend in Python, with tests
I'll create a team with specialized teammates for this.

[TeammateManager] Team created:
  frontend-dev [idle] - React specialist
  backend-dev [idle] - Python API specialist
  tester [idle] - QA engineer
steps.annotation: Unlike subagents (v3), teammates persist across tasks

steps.content: Team of 3 created. All teammates idle and ready for task assignment.
steps.annotation: Teammates have identity and state tracking

steps.content: Team is ready. I'll assign tasks to each teammate via the task board.
steps.annotation: Persistent teammates vs one-shot subagents: they remember context
